suite.name: Epic3 Review System

kw.name: Suite Init
Run Process
kw.doc: Runs a process and waits for it to complete.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Load Seed Output
Get File
kw.doc: Returns the contents of a specified file.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: Loaded seed: A=cmmc35b020004usn8tw2ie8yw B=cmmc35b0n0006usn87ist0z71 C=cmmc35b0x0008usn8897kspk0 preDispute=cmmc35b1z000fusn8yhrcdq14
kw.arg: Loaded seed: A=${BOOKING_A_ID} B=${BOOKING_B_ID} C=${BOOKING_C_ID} preDispute=${PRE_DISPUTE_ID}
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Read seed-output.json and set suite variables

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=api, url=http://localhost:3001/api, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: Login And Get Token
Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:3001/api/auth/login path_url=/api/auth/login headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '61', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"email": "rf_passenger@test.com", "password": "password123"}'
HTTPError: 429 Client Error: Too Many Requests for url: http://localhost:3001/api/auth/login
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.
kw.status: HTTPError: 429 Client Error: Too Many Requests for url: http://localhost:3001/api/auth/login

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.status: HTTPError: 429 Client Error: Too Many Requests for url: http://localhost:3001/api/auth/login

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Try Admin Login
kw.doc: Single admin login attempt to conserve rate limit

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.
Run seed, create API session, login all users
kw.status: HTTPError: 429 Client Error: Too Many Requests for url: http://localhost:3001/api/auth/login

test.name: TC-3.8 Passenger Sees Pending Reviews
test.doc: GET /reviews/pending returns bookings not yet reviewed
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: HTTPError: 429 Client Error: Too Many Requests for url: http://localhost:3001/api/auth/login

test.name: TC-3.1 Create 5-Star Review Successfully
test.doc: POST /reviews — 5 stars with positive tags [POST #1 of 6]
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: HTTPError: 429 Client Error: Too Many Requests for url: http://localhost:3001/api/auth/login

test.name: TC-3.12 Driver Creates Dispute Successfully
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: HTTPError: 429 Client Error: Too Many Requests for url: http://localhost:3001/api/auth/login

test.name: TC-3.13 Duplicate Dispute Returns 409
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: HTTPError: 429 Client Error: Too Many Requests for url: http://localhost:3001/api/auth/login

test.name: TC-3.6 Duplicate Review Returns 409
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: HTTPError: 429 Client Error: Too Many Requests for url: http://localhost:3001/api/auth/login

test.name: TC-3.7 Expired Review Window Returns 410
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: HTTPError: 429 Client Error: Too Many Requests for url: http://localhost:3001/api/auth/login

test.name: TC-3.4 Invalid Tag For Rating Returns 400
test.doc: Negative tag on 5-star → 400 [POST #6 of 6 — last POST budget]
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: HTTPError: 429 Client Error: Too Many Requests for url: http://localhost:3001/api/auth/login

test.name: TC-3.10 Review Immutability — No PUT or DELETE Route
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: HTTPError: 429 Client Error: Too Many Requests for url: http://localhost:3001/api/auth/login

test.name: TC-3.8b My Reviews Shows Submitted Review
test.doc: GET /reviews/me returns the review just created
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: HTTPError: 429 Client Error: Too Many Requests for url: http://localhost:3001/api/auth/login

test.name: TC-3.8c Check Has Reviewed Returns True
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: HTTPError: 429 Client Error: Too Many Requests for url: http://localhost:3001/api/auth/login

test.name: TC-3.9 Verify Pre-Seeded Anonymous Review
test.doc: Seed created anonymous-style review for bookingB — verify via GET
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: HTTPError: 429 Client Error: Too Many Requests for url: http://localhost:3001/api/auth/login

test.name: TC-3.14a Driver Views Received Reviews
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: HTTPError: 429 Client Error: Too Many Requests for url: http://localhost:3001/api/auth/login

test.name: TC-3.14b Driver Stats Public Endpoint
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: HTTPError: 429 Client Error: Too Many Requests for url: http://localhost:3001/api/auth/login

test.name: TC-4.1a Admin Lists Disputes
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: HTTPError: 429 Client Error: Too Many Requests for url: http://localhost:3001/api/auth/login

test.name: TC-4.1b Admin Resolves Dispute — Hide Review
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: HTTPError: 429 Client Error: Too Many Requests for url: http://localhost:3001/api/auth/login

test.name: TC-4.2 Admin Rejects Dispute
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: HTTPError: 429 Client Error: Too Many Requests for url: http://localhost:3001/api/auth/login

test.name: TC-3.14c Driver Stats Updated After Dispute Resolution
test.doc: After hiding review, driver stats should update
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: HTTPError: 429 Client Error: Too Many Requests for url: http://localhost:3001/api/auth/login

kw.name: Delete All Sessions
kw.doc: Removes all the session objects

suite.doc: Epic 3 — Ride Review & Rating System API Tests Covers TC-3.1 to TC-3.14 and Admin TC-4.1, TC-4.2 Rate-limit aware: authLimiter = 10 POST/15 min (shared login+reviews+disputes) Run: robot --outputdir results epic3_review_system.robot
suite.status: Suite setup failed: HTTPError: 429 Client Error: Too Many Requests for url: http://localhost:3001/api/auth/login
